title: MODEL CAR detail page » MODEL CAR BRAND
user_story:
As a visitor
I want the MODEL CAR detail page to show the connected MODEL CAR BRAND
So I can ...
description:
* The MODEL CAR detail page is extended to contain a section for the connected MODEL CAR BRAND.
* The MODEL CAR BRAND is presented with its name and primary information.
* The MODEL CAR BRAND contains a link to its detail page.
* The MODEL CAR BRAND has a thumbnail image.
* When there is no MODEL CAR BRAND connected to the MODEL CAR then the section is not displayed at all.
